channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ Closes Criminal Probe into Fed Chair Jerome Powell Under Senatorial Pressure
item.description: The Justice Department is closing its criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, according to DC US Attorney Jeanine Pirro.

item.title: Teenager Arrested Following Fatal Shooting at Mall of Louisiana
item.description: Police said the shooting followed an altercation between two groups in the mall's food court, resulting in a fatality and a teen suspect taken into custody.

item.title: First Look: Two Giant Pandas Heading to Zoo Atlanta on Research Loan
item.description: Pandas Ping Ping and Fu Shuang are being loaned to Zoo Atlanta under a new cooperative research agreement between the zoo and China Wildlife Conservation Association.

item.title: One Missing USF Doctoral Student Found Dead; Roommate Taken into Custody
item.description: One of two missing University of Southern Florida doctoral students was found dead, and his roommate was taken into custody by law enforcement on Friday.

item.title: US Soldier Accused of Using Classified Intelligence to Win $400K in Betting Faces Court
